SEARCH
Module com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.user.impl
Package com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.committee.impl

Class ViewCommitteeProductivity

java.lang.Object
com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.committee.impl.ViewCommitteeProductivity
All Implemented Interfaces:
java.io.Serializable
@Entity(name="ViewCommitteeProductivity") public class ViewCommitteeProductivity extends java.lang.Object implements java.io.Serializable
JPA entity for view_committee_productivity database view. Intelligence Purpose: Comprehensive committee productivity and efficiency metrics combining membership, decisions, documents, and ballots to generate productivity scores and identify performance concerns. Created by: Database schema v1.0+ Risk Rules Supported: C-01 through C-04 (Committee performance rules) Enables identification of underperforming committees and operational bottlenecks through multi-dimensional productivity analysis.
See Also:
